value.stringValue: IF([Score_Sheet__c].Evaluated_Score__c >= VALUE($Label.NEW_OEM_Quality) , 'Quality Customer', IF([Score_Sheet__c].Evaluated_Score__c >= VALUE($Label.NEW_OEM_Normal) , 'Normal Customer', 'Inferior Customer'))

IF([Score_Sheet__c].Evaluated_Score__c >= VALUE($Label.OLD_AG_Strategy) , 'Strategy Customer', IF([Score_Sheet__c].Evaluated_Score__c >= VALUE($Label.OLD_AG_Quality) , 'Quality Customer', IF([Score_Sheet__c].Evaluated_Score__c >= VALUE($Label.OLD_AG_Normal) , 'Normal Customer', 'Potential Eliminated Customer')))
